
erstelldatum: 2026-02-26 tags:

- lalg1
- eliminationsverfahren Folien: Eliminationsverfahren I

Strategische Einleitung

Das Eliminationsverfahren nach Gauss bildet das algorithmische Fundament der Linearen Algebra. In der Ingenieurpraxis, etwa in der Baustatik oder der elektrischen Netzwerkplanung, m√ºssen hunderte abh√§ngige Variablen gleichzeitig bestimmt werden. Dieses Kapitel f√ºhrt das systematische L√∂sen solcher Systeme ein, indem es geometrische Ansichten (Lage von Vektoren) in algebraische Rechenvorschriften √ºbersetzt. Es bereitet den √úbergang von der anschaulichen Vektorrechnung zur abstrakten Systemanalyse vor.

Wichtige Formeln

- **Linearkombination:** v![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)=x1‚Äãa![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)1‚Äã+x2‚Äãa![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)2‚Äã+‚ãØ+xN‚Äãa![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)N‚Äã
    - _Analyse:_ Beschreibt die Erzeugung neuer Vektoren durch Skalierung und Summation; fundamental f√ºr das Superpositionsprinzip in der Mechanik.
- **Lineare Abh√§ngigkeit:** x1‚Äãa![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)1‚Äã+x2‚Äãa![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)2‚Äã+‚ãØ+xN‚Äãa![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%20 (mit mindestens einem xi‚ÄãÓÄÝ=0)
    - _Analyse:_ Identifiziert Redundanzen in Systemen; in der Statik ein Indikator f√ºr kinematische Instabilit√§t.
- **Kollinearit√§t:** a![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)=Œªb![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)
    - _Analyse:_ Nachweis der parallelen Ausrichtung von Kraftvektoren oder Bauteilachsen.

Definitionen

[!INFO] Definition: Linearkombination Die Summe von Vektoren {a![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,a![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>)N‚Äã}, die jeweils mit einem Skalar xi‚Äã‚ààR (Koeffizient) gewichtet wurden.

[!INFO] Definition: Lineare Abh√§ngigkeit Eine Menge von Vektoren ist linear abh√§ngig, wenn der Nullvektor durch eine [[Kapitel 1#Definition: Linearkombination|Linearkombination]] erzeugt werden kann, deren Koeffizienten nicht alle null sind. Geometrisch impliziert dies bei drei Vektoren im R3 die **Komplanarit√§r** (Lage in einer gemeinsamen Ebene).

[!INFO] Definition: Dreiecksform Ein Zustand eines LGS, bei dem alle Koeffizienten unterhalb der Hauptdiagonalen verschwinden. Dies ist das Ziel der Gauss-Elimination zur Erm√∂glichung der R√ºckw√§rtssubstitution.

Herleitungen

Das **Gauss-Eliminationsverfahren** transformiert ein LGS schrittweise in die Zeilenstufenform. Der logische Pfad schreibt vor: Die "Pivot-Zeile", die zur Elimination in darunterliegenden Zeilen genutzt wird, bleibt in diesem Schritt unver√§ndert, um die L√∂sungsmenge nicht zu manipulieren.

Analytisch l√§sst sich die komplanare Lage dreier Vektoren laut **Abbildung 1.1** so herleiten: Zwei Vektoren a![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>) und c![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>) spannen eine Ebene auf. Durch Verschieben von c![](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg%20xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"%20width="0.471em"%20height="0.714em"%20style="width:0.471em"%20viewBox="0%200%20471%20714"%20preserveAspectRatio="xMinYMin"><path%20d="M377%2020c0-5.333%201.833-10%205.5-14S391%200%20397%200c4.667%200%208.667%201.667%2012%2053.333%202.667%206.667%209%2010%2019%206.667%2024.667%2020.333%2043.667%2041%2057%207.333%204.667%201110.667%2011%2018%200%206-1%2010-3%2012s-6.667%205-14%209c-28.667%2014.667-53.667%2035.667-75%2063-1.333%201.333-3.167%203.5-5.5%206.5s-4%204.833-5%205.5c-1%20.667-2.5%201.333-4.5%202s-4.333%201-7%201c-4.667%200-9.167-1.833-13.5-5.5S337%20184%20337%20178c0-12.667%2015.667-32.333%2047-59H213l-171-1c-8.667-6-13-12.333-13-19%200-4.667%204.333-11.333%2013-20h359c-16-25.333-24-45-24-59z"></path></svg>) an die Spitze von Dieser geschlossene Vektorzug beweist die lineare Abh√§ngigkeit.

Synthese & Transfer

Das Gauss-Verfahren ist das Werkzeug zur Pr√ºfung struktureller Integrit√§t; im n√§chsten Schritt abstrahieren wir diese Rechenoperationen im [[Kapitel 2|Vektorraum]].
